description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.31.0 ports upstream CodexBar v0.31.0 provider behavior, adds AWS Bedrock named profile credential resolution, shows Codex Spark quota lanes, hides Claude Design quota, and makes local Codex/Claude chart scans cancellation-aware.
